summary: TAREA F1.3: Modo 'Lo hago yo' - Constructor de comida en 2 pasos. All requested features tested and verified working. Fixed 1 bug during testing.
passed_tests: ✅ Modal 'Lo hago yo' opens when clicking button on empty meal (data-testid='build-meal-C1')
✅ Header shows: 'Restante: macros restantes' - updates in real-time when adding foods
✅ Progress bars P/H/G update in real-time when foods are added
✅ PASO 1 shows protein categories: Carnes, Pescados, Huevos, Lácteos, Prote(ína), Vegetal, Soja
✅ 'Solo genéricos' checkbox present (filter by tag=GEN - note: no GEN tagged data exists)
✅ Suggestions appear without searching ('LO QUE MEJOR TE ENCAJA' section)
✅ Adding food: appears in INGREDIENTES section with macros displayed
✅ INGREDIENTES shows food count (e.g., '(1/5)') enforcing max 5 limit
✅ If P < 80%: message 'Te faltan Xg P. Elige otra proteína.' with 'Saltar al paso 2 →' link
✅ PASO 2 shows acompañamiento categories: Arroz, Pasta, Patata, Pan, Cereales, etc.
✅ Micro-suggestion for fats: 'Solo te faltan Xg G' with '+ Aceite de oliva Xg' button
✅ 'COMIDA CUADRADA' banner (green) appears when all macros within ±4g margin
✅ 'GUARDAR COMIDA CUADRADA' button saves meal and closes modal
✅ Saved meal displays in Comida card with green status indicator

bugs_fixed.issue: Macros not calculated when adding food from suggestions - showed 'P|H|G' instead of actual values
bugs_fixed.root_cause: handleAddFood received food object but macros_efectivos was on parent item, not food.macros_efectivos
bugs_fixed.fix: Added customMacros parameter to handleAddFood and passed macros from item.macros_efectivos

critical_code_review_comments: Note: 'Solo genéricos' checkbox exists but no foods have 'GEN' tag in database - this is a data issue, not code
The modal is fullscreen as specified and follows the 2-step flow correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: BuildMealModal component in NutritionPage.jsx implements the 'Lo hago yo' flow. Backend endpoints /api/calculator/suggest with paso parameter and /api/calculator/search with tag filter are working. One bug was fixed: macros were not being passed correctly when adding foods from suggestions.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Macros not displayed in INGREDIENTES section after adding food
rca_of_the_issue.symptoms: Showed 'P|H|G' text instead of actual macro values like '45P|75H|0G'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In handleAddFood, when customQuantity was provided, macrosEf was set from food.macros_efectivos. But 'food' was extracted from item.alimento, while macros_efectivos was on 'item' not 'item.alimento'
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added third parameter 'customMacros' to handleAddFood and updated onClick to pass item.macros_efectivos: onClick={() => handleAddFood(food, cantidad, macros)}
